message: Revise beads for installer prompt tests

files.patch:
@@ -633,3 +633,69 @@ jobs:
           ls -1 artifacts/ | while read f; do
             echo "- \`$f\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           done
+
+  # Publish rch-common to crates.io (library crate only)
+  # Binary crates are not published - users install via GitHub releases
+  publish-crates:
+    name: Publish to crates.io
+    needs: [plan, publish]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    # Skip pre-releases (tags containing -)
+    if: ${{ !contains(needs.plan.outputs.tag, '-') }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      # Note: rich_rust is only needed for default features (rich-ui)
+      # We publish with --no-default-features so no local dependencies needed
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2025-01-01
+
+      - name: Verify version matches tag
+        run: |
+          cargo_version=$(awk '
+            /^\[workspace\.package\]/ { in_section=1; next }
+            /^\[/ { in_section=0 }
+            in_section && /^version[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*"/ {
+              gsub(/^version[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*"/, "")
+              gsub(/".*$/, "")
+              print
+              exit
+            }
+          ' Cargo.toml)
+          tag_version="${{ needs.plan.outputs.version }}"
+          if [[ "$cargo_version" != "$tag_version" ]]; then
+            echo "Version mismatch: Cargo.toml=$cargo_version, tag=$tag_version"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "Version verified: $cargo_version"
+
+      - name: Dry run publish (rch-common)
+        run: cargo publish -p rch-common --dry-run --no-default-features
+
+      - name: Publish rch-common to crates.io
+        if: ${{ env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != '' }}
+        env:
+          CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          echo "Publishing rch-common to crates.io..."
+          cargo publish -p rch-common --no-default-features || {
+            # If already published, that's OK
+            if [[ $? -eq 0 ]] || cargo search rch-common | grep -q "^rch-common"; then
+              echo "rch-common already published or publish succeeded"
+            else
+              exit 1
+            fi
+          }
+
+      - name: Summary
+        run: |
+          echo "## Crates.io Publish" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [[ -n "${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "✅ Published rch-common v${{ needs.plan.outputs.version }} to crates.io" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "⚠️ Skipped - CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN not configured" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi

@@ -14,12 +14,17 @@ edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 authors = ["Remote Compilation Helper Contributors"]
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/rch-common"
+readme = "README.md"
+keywords = ["compilation", "remote", "build", "ai", "agent"]
+categories = ["development-tools", "command-line-utilities"]
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # Serialization
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
-toon_rust = { path = "../toon_rust" }
+toon-rust = "0.1.3"
 
 # Async runtime
 tokio = { version = "1.43", features = ["full"] }
@@ -107,8 +112,7 @@ ratatui = "0.29"
 crossterm = "0.29"
 
 # Rich terminal output (optional, for enhanced UI)
-# During development, use path. When published, switch to version.
-rich_rust = { path = "/dp/rich_rust", features = ["full"] }
+rich_rust = { version = "0.1.0", features = ["full"] }
 
 # Internal crates
 rch-common = { path = "rch-common" }

@@ -3,6 +3,11 @@ name = "rch-common"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 description = "Shared types and utilities for Remote Compilation Helper"
 
 [lib]
